_comment: Phase 212.H.6 — PlatformIO library manifest. The pre-build extra_script invokes `nros codegen-system --ahead-of-vendor` to bake system.toml + launch/*.xml into vendor-native sources before PIO's library resolver sees the tree (PIO has no configure-time hook rich enough to read system.toml directly). User incantation: add `nano-ros` to platformio.ini `lib_deps` then `pio run -e <env>`.
name: nano-ros
description: Lightweight ROS 2 client for embedded RTOS (Zephyr, FreeRTOS, NuttX, ThreadX, bare-metal). no_std Rust core with C and C++ bindings.
keywords: ros2, ros, robotics, zenoh, dds, xrce-dds, embedded, no_std
_frameworks_comment: Arduino was advertised here with no implementation behind it (no library.properties, no glue) — removed (#171). espidf removed on the same precedent (no PIO/IDF test lane). Re-add only alongside a real integration.
